label: Adobe Commerce / Magento
_note: Per-product detail. requirementSource = the RICHEST matrix (Experience League: per-patch PHP/Composer/OpenSearch/MariaDB/RabbitMQ/Valkey for all Commerce versions). EL covers cloud + on-prem + OSS (same version/service matrix); editions differ only in FLOW. extensionSource (GitHub composer.json) enriches the ext-* list EL omits. The engine scrapes requirementSource once and shares it across editions.

alternateSources._note: magento-cloud / magento2 GitHub YAML are more stable (machine-readable, no footnote artifacts) but per-LINE, not per-patch. Use as a cross-check against EL in the validate gate.
